description: Style NoteThese aurelia leggings are crafted and designed to provide absolute comfort and perfect Fit. Team them with long or short kurtas and ballerina flats or pumps, dangle a pair of chunky earrings and you're all set to seize the day with a fab look.Product DetailsMaroon full length leggings with a soft elasticated waistbandMaterial and Care100% cotton Machine wash with like colours Do not bleach and dry in shade Use hot iron  Size and FitRegular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
